## Diagram 3

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph "Query Dictionaries"
        Q[q: PARTVIEW source]
        Q2[q2: SHIPMENT source]
        Q3[q3_good: SHIPMENT source with SCAC]
    end
    Q3 --> API[eta_lib.get_eta_batch]
    API --> Result[ETA Output]
```

## Diagram 4

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class QueryParameters {
        +string status
        +int mode-id
        +string departure
        +string eta-source
        +string dest-loc-id
        +string orgin-loc-id
        +string points-of-interest
        +string points-interest-date
        +int carrier-organization-id
        +string shipment-status-code
        +string org_fv_id
        +string scac
    }
    class ETALib {
        +get_eta_batch(query)
    }
    QueryParameters --> ETALib : input to
```
